_model: 2013 ACC/AHA Pooled Cohort Equations, 10-year ASCVD risk
_source: Goff DC Jr, et al. Circulation. 2014;129(25 Suppl 2):S49-S73, Appendix 7
_note: No equation exists for Hispanic adults; scored with white_or_other by convention.
_instructions: Fill S0, mean_S, and each beta from the source, then set _verified to true.
